entries.source: "Ask Ambedkar about democracy"
"Ask me questions before explaining too much."
"Check my answer before giving yours."
"Give me a harder version after I try."
"Keep it beginner friendly."
"Meet Ada Lovelace"
"Talk to Cleopatra"
"Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "ከፈተናዬ፣ ፕሮጀክቴ ወይም ዕለታዊ ሕይወቴ ምሳሌዎችን ተጠቀም።"

entries.source: AI prompts
Ask for a tiny first task.
End with a recap you write yourself.
For Talk to a historical person, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: ለTalk to a historical person፣ ጠቃሚ የልምምድ ዑደት ይህ ነው፦

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: ለዚህ ሁነታ ሥራው ቀላል ነው፦ ጥያቄዎችን ይጠይቁ፣ ሐሳቦችን ይሞግቱ፣ እና ከቀድሞ የህዝብ ሰዎች ጋር በተመሠረቱ ውይይቶች ታሪክን ይማሩ።

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: ጥሩ ጥያቄ መነሻዎች ብዙ ጊዜ ሦስት ነገሮችን ያካትታሉ፦ የትምህርት ርዕሱን፣ የአሁኑን ደረጃዎን እና የሚፈልጉትን የእገዛ ዓይነት። ፍጹም ቃላት አያስፈልጉዎትም። ክፍለ ጊዜው እንዲጀምር በቂ አውድ ብቻ ያስፈልግዎታል።

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: መልሱ በጣም ሰፊ ከመሰለ፣ ያጥብቁት። አንድ ምሳሌ፣ አንድ የተሳሳተ ግንዛቤ፣ አንድ የማረጋገጫ ጥያቄ ወይም አንድ ቀጣይ ደረጃ ይጠይቁ። በጣም ቀላል ከመሰለ፣ ፈተና ይጠይቁ። በጣም ከባድ ከመሰለ፣ ከሚያውቁት ነገር የሚጀምር ድልድይ ይጠይቁ።

entries.source: Immersion
Make the output more useful
Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Talk to a historical person on inspir.
entries.value: በinspir ላይ Talk to a historical person ጠቃሚ የመማር ውጤት እንዲሰጥ የፕሮምፕት ሐሳቦች እና ሊደገም የሚችል የጥናት ዑደት።

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: የኤአይ መልስ ማንበብ መማር አይደለም። ከመጀመሪያው መልስ በኋላ፣ ሁነታው ከሐሳቡ ጋር አንድ ነገር እንዲያደርጉ ይጠይቁ።

entries.source: Related learning paths
Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: እርግጠኛ ባልሆነው ክፍል ላይ ግብረመልስ ይጠይቁ።

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
Start with one clear request
State the goal in one sentence.
study skills
Talk to a historical person prompts and study loop
entries.value: የTalk to a historical person ጥያቄ መነሻዎች እና የጥናት ዑደት

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: ያ የመጨረሻ ማጠቃለያ አስፈላጊ ነው። ሐሳቡን መልሰው ሲያብራሩ፣ ምን ጠንካራ እንደሆነ እና ምን አሁንም ከAI የተዋሰ እንደሆነ ይገልጣሉ።

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: ምርጥ የመማር ክፍለ-ጊዜዎች ሊስተካከሉ የሚችሉ ናቸው። መተግበሪያው በገጸ-ባሕርይ ውስጥ የሚደረግ ውይይትን ስለመዝገቦችና ስለእርግጠኝነት ከሚያስገነዝቡ አጭር context notes ይለያል።

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Talk to a historical person is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: ከTalk to a historical person ጠቃሚ ውጤት ለማግኘት ፈጣኑ መንገድ ለኤአይው ርዕስ ብቻ ሳይሆን የመማር ሥራ መስጠት ነው። ርዕስ የሚስብዎትን ይናገራል፤ የመማር ሥራ ደግሞ ምን ዓይነት እርዳታ እንደሚፈልጉ ይናገራል።

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: ከዚያ ክፍለ-ጊዜውን የበለጠ ግላዊ የሚያደርግ ገደብ ያክሉ፦

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
Turn the mode into practice

Use Talk to a historical person when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Time travel. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Talk to a historical person ለዚህ ሥራ ትክክለኛው ሁነታ ሲሆን ይጠቀሙበት። ተዛማጅ መንገድ ከፈለጉ፣ Time travelን ይሞክሩ። እንዲሁም ስለ ጥናት ዘዴዎች፣ Socratic መማር፣ ፍላሽካርዶች፣ ሚና ጨዋታ እና ንቁ ማስታወስ የኤአይ መማር ብሎግን ማሰስ ይችላሉ።
